title: Quantum Tunneling and Barrier Penetration

analysis.object: T680: Quantum Tunneling and Barrier Penetration depth analysis

tunneling_eml3.description: Tunneling: EML-3 oscillatory evanescent wave penetrating classically forbidden region
tunneling_eml3.reason: Tunneling is EML-3: exponentially decaying oscillatory wavefunction in classically forbidden zone

instanton_connection.description: Tunneling = instanton in imaginary time; EML-inf topology change between vacua
instanton_connection.reason: Instanton tunneling is EML-inf: topology change via imaginary-time path; TYPE3 vacuum transition

probability_eml2.description: Tunneling probability: EML-2 measurement (WKB formula; exponential transmission coefficient)
probability_eml2.reason: Tunneling rate is EML-2: WKB gives EML-2 exponential formula T ~ exp(-2*kappa*L)
